C:\PROGRA~1\AMD\ROCm\5.7\bin\CLANG_~1.EXE -nostartfiles -nostdlib -O0 -g -Xclang -gcodeview -D_DEBUG -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrtd -Xlinker /subsystem:console -fuse-ld=lld-link @CMakeFiles\test_sandbox.dir\objects1.rsp -o test_sandbox.exe -Xlinker /MANIFEST:EMBED -Xlinker /implib:test_sandbox.lib -Xlinker /pdb:C:\Users\33598\Desktop\软件工程综合实验\OJ\judge\build\test_sandbox.pdb -Xlinker /version:0.0  @CMakeFiles\test_sandbox.dir\linkLibs.rsp
